The directive, which Anthropic says it received at 5:21pm ET on 12 June, cites national security authorities and demands […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> 80 Texas residents are suing SpaceX, saying rocket launches are literally destroying their homes https://thenextweb.com/news/spacex-starbase-class-action-homes-damaged-launches Fri, 12 Jun 2026 20:31:33 +0000 TheNextWeb=28d6c93a4aa01778235c602c751d6777 Eighty residents of towns near SpaceX’s Starbase facility in South Texas have filed a class-action lawsuit alleging that the company’s constant rocket launches are physically destroying their homes. The lawsuit accuses SpaceX of negligence, gross negligence, and trespass based on the Commercial Space Launch Act of 1984.
